# 3) SalesService كامل

## `SalesService.cs`
```csharp
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class SalesService : ISalesService
    {
        private readonly ISalesInvoiceRepository _salesInvoiceRepository;
        private readonly IProductRepository _productRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseRepository _warehouseRepository;
        private readonly ICustomerRepository _customerRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseStockRepository _warehouseStockRepository;
        private readonly IInventoryMovementRepository _inventoryMovementRepository;
        private readonly IInvoiceNumberGenerator _invoiceNumberGenerator;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public SalesService(
            ISalesInvoiceRepository salesInvoiceRepository,
            IProductRepository productRepository,
            IWarehouseRepository warehouseRepository,
            ICustomerRepository customerRepository,
            IWarehouseStockRepository warehouseStockRepository,
            IInventoryMovementRepository inventoryMovementRepository,
            IInvoiceNumberGenerator invoiceNumberGenerator,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _salesInvoiceRepository = salesInvoiceRepository;
            _productRepository = productRepository;
            _warehouseRepository = warehouseRepository;
            _customerRepository = customerRepository;
            _warehouseStockRepository = warehouseStockRepository;
            _inventoryMovementRepository = inventoryMovementRepository;
            _invoiceNumberGenerator = invoiceNumberGenerator;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            if (request is null)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Request is required.");

            if (request.Items is null || request.Items.Count == 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Invoice must contain at least one item.");

            if (request.DiscountAmount < 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Discount amount cannot be negative.");

            if (request.TaxAmount < 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Tax amount cannot be negative.");

            if (request.PaidAmount < 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount cannot be negative.");

            if (request.PaymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash && request.CustomerId is null)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Customer is required for credit or mixed sales.");

            if (request.PaymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash && !request.DueDate.HasValue)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Due date is required for credit or mixed sales.");

            var warehouse = await _warehouseRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            if (warehouse is null || !warehouse.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse not found or inactive.");

            Customer? customer = null;
            if (request.CustomerId.HasValue)
            {
                customer = await _customerRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.CustomerId.Value, cancellationToken);
                if (customer is null || !customer.IsActive)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Customer not found or inactive.");
            }

            // تجهيز البنود + التحقق من المخزون
            var invoiceItems = new List<SalesInvoiceItem>();
            decimal subTotal = 0m;

            foreach (var item in request.Items)
            {
                if (item.ProductId <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Invalid product.");

                if (item.Quantity <= 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Item quantity must be greater than zero.");

                if (item.UnitPrice < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Unit price cannot be negative.");

                if (item.DiscountAmount < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure("Item discount cannot be negative.");

                var product = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                if (product is null || !product.IsActive)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Product not found or inactive. ProductId={item.ProductId}");

                var currentStock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                    request.WarehouseId,
                    product.ProductId,
                    cancellationToken);

                if (currentStock is null || currentStock.Quantity < item.Quantity)
                {
                    var available = currentStock?.Quantity ?? 0m;
                    return Result<int>.Failure(
                        $"Insufficient stock for product '{product.Name}'. Available: {available}, Requested: {item.Quantity}");
                }

                var unitPrice = item.UnitPrice == 0 ? product.SalePrice : item.UnitPrice;
                var lineGross = item.Quantity * unitPrice;

                if (item.DiscountAmount > lineGross)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Item discount exceeds line amount for product '{product.Name}'.");

                var lineTotal = lineGross - item.DiscountAmount;
                if (lineTotal < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Invalid line total for product '{product.Name}'.");

                invoiceItems.Add(new SalesInvoiceItem
                {
                    ProductId = product.ProductId,
                    Quantity = item.Quantity,
                    UnitPrice = unitPrice,
                    DiscountAmount = item.DiscountAmount,
                    LineTotal = lineTotal,
                    Notes = item.Notes
                });

                subTotal += lineTotal;
            }

            var totalAmount = subTotal - request.DiscountAmount + request.TaxAmount;
            if (totalAmount < 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Total amount cannot be negative.");

            decimal paidAmount = request.PaymentType switch
            {
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash => totalAmount,
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit => 0m,
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed => request.PaidAmount,
                _ => request.PaidAmount
            };

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash &&
                request.PaidAmount != 0m &&
                request.PaidAmount != totalAmount)
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount for cash sale must be equal to total or left as zero.");
            }

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit && request.PaidAmount != 0m)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount must be zero for credit sales.");

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed &&
                (paidAmount < 0m || paidAmount > totalAmount))
            {
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount for mixed sale must be between 0 and total amount.");
            }

            var dueAmount = totalAmount - paidAmount;

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                var invoiceNo = await _invoiceNumberGenerator.GenerateSalesInvoiceNoAsync(cancellationToken);

                var invoice = new SalesInvoice
                {
                    InvoiceNo = invoiceNo,
                    CustomerId = request.CustomerId,
                    WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                    InvoiceDate = request.InvoiceDate,
                    DueDate = request.DueDate.HasValue
                        ? DateOnly.FromDateTime(request.DueDate.Value)
                        : null,
                    PaymentType = (InvoicePaymentType)request.PaymentType,
                    SubTotal = subTotal,
                    DiscountAmount = request.DiscountAmount,
                    TaxAmount = request.TaxAmount,
                    TotalAmount = totalAmount,
                    PaidAmount = paidAmount,
                    DueAmount = dueAmount,
                    Notes = request.Notes,
                    Status = InvoiceStatus.Posted,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    Items = invoiceItems
                };

                await _salesInvoiceRepository.AddAsync(invoice, cancellationToken);
                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

                // تحديث المخزون + سجل الحركات
                foreach (var item in invoiceItems)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        request.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null)
                    {
                        // من المفترض ألا نصل هنا بسبب التحقق السابق
                        return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse stock row is missing.");
                    }

                    stock.Quantity -= item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.SaleOut,
                            ReferenceType = "SalesInvoice",
                            ReferenceId = invoice.SalesInvoiceId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitPrice,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Sale invoice stock out",
                            CreatedByUserId = invoice.CreatedByUserId
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                // تحديث رصيد العميل إذا كان هناك دين
                if (customer is not null && dueAmount > 0m)
                {
                    customer.CurrentBalance += dueAmount;
                    customer.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                }

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(invoice.SalesInvoiceId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<SalesInvoiceDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null)
                return Result<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Failure("Sales invoice not found.");

            var dto = _mapper.Map<SalesInvoiceDto>(entity);
            return Result<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Success(dto);
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm,
                request.PageNumber,
                request.PageSize,
                cancellationToken);

            var mappedItems = _mapper.Map<List<SalesInvoiceListDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>.Success(
                new PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>
                {
                    Items = mappedItems,
                    TotalCount = totalCount,
                    PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                    PageSize = request.PageSize
                });
        }

        public async Task<Result> CancelAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var invoice = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (invoice is null)
                return Result.Failure("Sales invoice not found.");

            if (invoice.Status == InvoiceStatus.Cancelled)
                return Result.Success();

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                // إعادة المخزون
                foreach (var item in invoice.Items)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        invoice.WarehouseId,
                        item.ProductId,
                        cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null)
                    {
                        stock = new WarehouseStock
                        {
                            WarehouseId = invoice.WarehouseId,
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            Quantity = 0m,
                            UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                        };

                        await _warehouseStockRepository.AddAsync(stock, cancellationToken);
                    }

                    stock.Quantity += item.Quantity;
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(
                        new InventoryMovement
                        {
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            WarehouseId = invoice.WarehouseId,
                            MovementType = InventoryMovementType.SaleReturnIn,
                            ReferenceType = "SalesInvoiceCancel",
                            ReferenceId = invoice.SalesInvoiceId,
                            Quantity = item.Quantity,
                            UnitCost = item.UnitPrice,
                            MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                            Notes = "Cancel sales invoice - stock returned",
                            CreatedByUserId = invoice.CreatedByUserId
                        },
                        cancellationToken);
                }

                // عكس رصيد العميل إذا كان هناك دين
                if (invoice.CustomerId.HasValue && invoice.DueAmount > 0m)
                {
                    var customer = await _customerRepository.GetByIdAsync(invoice.CustomerId.Value, cancellationToken);
                    if (customer is not null)
                    {
                        customer.CurrentBalance -= invoice.DueAmount;
                        if (customer.CurrentBalance < 0m)
                            customer.CurrentBalance = 0m;

                        customer.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                    }
                }

                invoice.Status = InvoiceStatus.Cancelled;
                invoice.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result.Success();
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<SalesSummaryDto>> GetSummaryAsync(
            SalesSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var summary = await _salesInvoiceRepository.GetSummaryAsync(
                request.From,
                request.To,
                request.WarehouseId,
                cancellationToken);

            return Result<SalesSummaryDto>.Success(summary);
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 4) ملاحظات مهمة جدًا على هذا التصميم

## أ) لماذا استخدمنا `Status = Posted` عند الإنشاء؟
لأن فاتورة البيع في الواقع غالبًا:
- تُحفظ مباشرة
- تُخصم من المخزون مباشرة
- وتؤثر على رصيد العميل

أما `Draft` فممكن نضيفها لاحقًا لو أردت “مسودة فاتورة”.

---

## ب) لماذا لا نحذف الفاتورة؟
لأن الأفضل محاسبيًا:
- لا نحذف
- بل نلغي `Cancel`

هذا يحافظ على السجل التاريخي.

---

## ج) لماذا سجلنا الحركة `InventoryMovement`؟
لأن هذا مفيد جدًا لاحقًا في:
- التقارير
- تتبع المنتج
- مراجعة الأخطاء
- إعادة بناء المخزون

---

## د) هل هذا يكفي للمبيعات؟
نعم، هذا يكفي كبداية قوية جدًا.

لكن في المرحلة التالية نحتاج:
- `PurchaseService`
- `InventoryService`
- `CustomerPaymentService`
- `SupplierPaymentService`

---

# 5) ما الذي يلزم في الـ Infrastructure الآن؟
لكي يعمل هذا الكود، تحتاج لاحقًا إلى:
- EF Core Repositories
- `UnitOfWork` مع Transaction
- `InvoiceNumberGenerator`
- `GetByIdWithDetailsAsync` مع `Include(...)`

---

# 6) الأفضل الآن
الخطوة التالية المنطقية بعد هذا هي أحد الخيارين:

## الخيار 1
أكتب لك **PurchaseService** بنفس المستوى

## الخيار 2
أبدأ معك بـ **Infrastructure Implementation**
مثل:
- `SalesInvoiceRepository`
- `WarehouseStockRepository`
- `UnitOfWork`
- `Ef Transaction Adapter`

---

إذا أردت رأيي:  
**ننتقل الآن إلى Infrastructure implementation**  
لأنها ستجعل `SalesService` يعمل فعليًا.


ممتاز.  
الآن نبدأ بالخطوة العملية: **API Controllers**.

> ملاحظة مهمة:  
> الـ Controllers هنا ستكون **رفيعة Thin Controllers**  
> يعني:
> - لا تحتوي منطق أعمال
> - فقط تستقبل الطلب
> - تنقله إلى `Application Services`
> - ثم تعيد النتيجة بشكل JSON

---

# 1) تنظيم مشروع الـ API

أنصح بهذا الشكل:

```text
SalesSystem.Api
?
??? Controllers
?   ??? BaseApiController.cs
?   ??? ProductsController.cs
?   ??? SalesController.cs
?
??? Program.cs
??? appsettings.json
```

---

# 2) Base Controller للتعامل مع Result

حتى لا نكرر كود `Ok / BadRequest` في كل Controller، سننشئ Base Controller.

## `BaseApiController.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [ApiController]
    public abstract class BaseApiController : ControllerBase
    {
        protected ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<T>> FromResult<T>(Result<T> result)
        {
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<T>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Unknown error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<T>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        protected ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>> FromResult(Result result)
        {
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Unknown error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Success"));
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 3) ProductsController

هذا هو أهم Controller للبداية لأنه:
- أول CRUD
- أول شاشة في الواجهة
- يعطيك مسارًا كاملًا من API إلى Database

## `ProductsController.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/[controller]")]
    public class ProductsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IProductService _productService;

        public ProductsController(IProductService productService)
        {
            _productService = productService;
        }

        // GET: api/products?pageNumber=1&pageSize=20&searchTerm=milk
        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _productService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        // GET: api/products/5
        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<ProductDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<ProductDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<ProductDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        // GET: api/products/lookup?searchTerm=milk
        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        // POST: api/products
        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Product created successfully"));
        }

        // PUT: api/products/5
        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(
            int id,
            [FromBody] UpdateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Product updated successfully"));
        }

        // DELETE: api/products/5
        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _productService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Product deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 4) SalesController

هذا مهم جدًا لأنه يمثل:
- إنشاء فاتورة البيع
- عرض الفواتير
- إلغاء الفاتورة
- التقارير المختصرة

## `SalesController.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Sales;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/[controller]")]
    public class SalesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ISalesService _salesService;

        public SalesController(ISalesService salesService)
        {
            _salesService = salesService;
        }

        // GET: api/sales?pageNumber=1&pageSize=20&searchTerm=sal
        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _salesService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SalesInvoiceListDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        // GET: api/sales/5
        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SalesInvoiceDto?>>> GetById(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SalesInvoiceDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        // POST: api/sales
        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreateSalesInvoiceRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(
                nameof(GetById),
                new { id = result.Data },
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Sales invoice created successfully"));
        }

        // POST: api/sales/5/cancel
        [HttpPost("{id:int}/cancel")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Cancel(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.CancelAsync(id, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Sales invoice cancelled successfully"));
        }

        // GET: api/sales/summary?from=2025-01-01&to=2025-01-31&warehouseId=1
        [HttpGet("summary")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SalesSummaryDto>>> Summary(
            [FromQuery] SalesSummaryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _salesService.GetSummaryAsync(request, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SalesSummaryDto>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SalesSummaryDto>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 5) إضافة Controllers أخرى لاحقًا

بعد هذا، نفس النمط سيتكرر مع:
- `CategoriesController`
- `UnitsController`
- `WarehousesController`
- `CustomersController`
- `SuppliersController`
- `PurchasesController`
- `ReturnsController`
- `TransfersController`

لكن **لا تبدأ بهم جميعًا الآن**.  
ابدأ بـ:
1. Products
2. Sales

ثم بعد التأكد من التشغيل نكمل الباقي.

---

# 6) تسجيل Application Services في DI

أنت الآن تحتاج تسجيل خدمات الـ Application نفسها.

## `SalesSystem.Application/DependencyInjection.cs`

```csharp
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Mapping;
using SalesSystem.Application.Services;

namespace SalesSystem.Application
{
    public static class DependencyInjection
    {
        public static IServiceCollection AddApplication(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddAutoMapper(typeof(ProductMappingProfile).Assembly);

            services.AddScoped<IProductService, ProductService>();
            services.AddScoped<ISalesService, SalesService>();

            // لاحقًا:
            // services.AddScoped<ICategoryService, CategoryService>();
            // services.AddScoped<IUnitService, UnitService>();
            // services.AddScoped<IWarehouseService, WarehouseService>();
            // services.AddScoped<ICustomerService, CustomerService>();
            // services.AddScoped<ISupplierService, SupplierService>();
            // services.AddScoped<IPurchaseService, PurchaseService>();

            return services;
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 7) Program.cs في API

## `SalesSystem.Api/Program.cs`

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Application;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure;

var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

builder.Services.AddControllers();

builder.Services.AddApplication();
builder.Services.AddInfrastructure(builder.Configuration);

builder.Services.AddEndpointsApiExplorer();
builder.Services.AddSwaggerGen();

var app = builder.Build();

if (app.Environment.IsDevelopment())
{
    app.UseSwagger();
    app.UseSwaggerUI();
}

app.UseAuthorization();

app.MapControllers();

app.Run();
```

# 9) كيف تختبره بسرعة؟

- افتح Swagger
- جرّب:
  - `POST /api/products`
  - `GET /api/products`
  - `POST /api/sales`
  - `GET /api/sales`

إذا نجحت هذه الدورة، فأنت أنجزت أول مسار كامل في النظام.

# 12) ملاحظات مهمة جدًا

## أ) لماذا لا نضع منطق الحسابات في Controller؟
لأن المنطق يجب أن يكون في:
- `Application`
- وليس في API Controller

هذا يحافظ على:
- النظافة
- التوسع
- قابلية إعادة الاستخدام للموبايل والويب

---

## ب) لماذا بدأنا بـ Products و Sales فقط؟
لأنهما:
- أهم مسارين
- يختبران النظام كاملًا
- وإذا اشتغلا، بقية الموديولات تصبح أسهل

---

## ج) ما الذي سنفعله بعد هذا؟
الخطوة الطبيعية التالية هي أحد هذه الثلاثة:

1. **CustomersController + SuppliersController**
2. **WarehousesController + Inventory endpoints**
3. **WinForms Desktop HttpClient service** للاتصال بالـ API

---

# 13) نصيحتي
أفضل خطوة الآن:
> **نبدأ بربط WinForms بالـ API**  
> حتى تختبر الشاشة والـ endpoint معًا

إذا أردت، أستطيع في الرسالة القادمة أن أكتب لك مباشرة:

# **Desktop HttpClient Service + ProductsList UserControl**
حتى تبدأ أول شاشة تعمل فعليًا مع الـ API.


ممتاز.  
الآن سنبني **أول جزء حقيقي في الـ Desktop**:

- `HttpClient Service` للمنتجات
- `ProductsListUserControl`
- وربطه بالـ API

هذا سيعطيك أول مسار كامل:
**WinForms ? API ? SQL Server**

---

# 1) ما الذي نحتاجه في مشروع Desktop؟
## أ) مراجع المشاريع
داخل `SalesSystem.Desktop` أضف Reference إلى:
- `SalesSystem.Contracts`

> لا تحتاج Reference إلى `Application` أو `Infrastructure` لأن الـ Desktop سيتعامل مع الـ API فقط.

## ب) NuGet Packages
أضف هذه الحزم:
- `Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting`
- `Microsoft.Extensions.Http`

---

# 2) ملف الإعدادات `appsettings.json`
ضعه داخل `SalesSystem.Desktop`:

```json
{
  "Api": {
    "BaseUrl": "http://localhost:5000/"
  }
}
```

### مهم
اجعل `appsettings.json`:
- **Copy to Output Directory = Copy if newer**

---

# 3) `Program.cs` في Desktop
هذا مثال جيد باستخدام `Host` وDependency Injection:

```csharp
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop
{
    internal static class Program
    {
        [STAThread]
        static void Main()
        {
            ApplicationConfiguration.Initialize();

            var host = Host.CreateDefaultBuilder()
                .ConfigureAppConfiguration((context, config) =>
                {
                    config.AddJsonFile("appsettings.json", optional: false, reloadOnChange: true);
                })
                .ConfigureServices((context, services) =>
                {
                    var baseUrl = context.Configuration["Api:BaseUrl"] ?? "http://localhost:5000/";

                    services.AddHttpClient<IProductApiService, ProductApiService>(client =>
                    {
                        client.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl);
                    });

                    services.AddTransient<ProductsListControl>();
                    services.AddTransient<MainForm>();
                })
                .Build();

            var mainForm = host.Services.GetRequiredService<MainForm>();
            Application.Run(mainForm);
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 4) واجهة خدمة المنتجات

## `IProductApiService.cs`
ضعها في:
`SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api/IProductApiService.cs`

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface IProductApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>> LookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<ProductDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

        Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
```

---

# 5) تنفيذ الخدمة

## `ProductApiService.cs`
ضعها في:
`SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api/ProductApiService.cs`

```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class ProductApiService : IProductApiService
    {
        private readonly HttpClient _httpClient;

        public ProductApiService(HttpClient httpClient)
        {
            _httpClient = httpClient;
        }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url =
                $"api/products?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}" +
                $"{BuildSearchQuery(request.SearchTerm)}";

            var response = await _httpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<ProductDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>> LookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/products/lookup{BuildSearchQuery(searchTerm)}";
            var response = await _httpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<ProductLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<ProductDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.GetAsync($"api/products/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<ProductDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/products", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(
            int id,
            UpdateProductRequestDto request,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/products/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            _ = await ReadAsync<object?>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(
            int id,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await _httpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/products/{id}", cancellationToken);
            _ = await ReadAsync<object?>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        private static string BuildSearchQuery(string? searchTerm)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                return string.Empty;

            return $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";
        }

        private static async Task<T> ReadAsync<T>(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<T>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);

            if (payload is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("الرد من السيرفر فارغ.");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode || !payload.IsSuccess)
                throw new InvalidOperationException(payload.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");

            if (payload.Data is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("لا توجد بيانات في الرد.");

            return payload.Data;
        }

        private static async Task<T?> ReadNullableAsync<T>(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<T?>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);

            if (payload is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("الرد من السيرفر فارغ.");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode || !payload.IsSuccess)
                throw new InvalidOperationException(payload.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");

            return payload.Data;
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 6) UserControl للمنتجات

## `ProductsListControl.cs`
ضعها في:
`SalesSystem.Desktop/Controls/Products/ProductsListControl.cs`

```csharp
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Products
{
    public class ProductsListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly IProductApiService _productApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvProducts = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public ProductsListControl(IProductApiService productApiService)
        {
            _productApiService = productApiService;
            InitializeComponent();

            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadProductsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            var topPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                Padding = new Padding(8)
            };

            txtSearch = new TextBox
            {
                Width = 260,
                PlaceholderText = "ابحث باسم المنتج أو الكود..."
            };

            btnSearch = new Button
            {
                Text = "بحث",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadProductsAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button
            {
                Text = "تحديث",
                Width = 80,
                Left = 8
            };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                txtSearch.Clear();
                await LoadProductsAsync();
            };

            btnAdd = new Button
            {
                Text = "إضافة",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnAdd.Click += (_, _) =>
            {
                MessageBox.Show("سنضيف ProductEditorForm في الخطوة التالية.");
            };

            btnEdit = new Button
            {
                Text = "تعديل",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnEdit.Click += (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedProductId();
                if (id is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("اختر منتجًا أولًا.");
                    return;
                }

                MessageBox.Show($"سنفتح شاشة تعديل المنتج رقم {id} في الخطوة التالية.");
            };

            btnDelete = new Button
            {
                Text = "حذف",
                Width = 80
            };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Right,
                Width = 280,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnDelete);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnEdit);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnAdd);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnRefresh);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSearch);

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false
            };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvProducts = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ReadOnly = true,
                AllowUserToAddRows = false,
                AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect,
                MultiSelect = false,
                AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvProducts.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvProducts.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedProductId();
                if (id is null) return;

                MessageBox.Show($"سنفتح شاشة تعديل المنتج رقم {id} في الخطوة التالية.");
            };

            lblStatus = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Bottom,
                Height = 24,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft,
                Padding = new Padding(8, 0, 0, 0),
                Text = "جاهز"
            };

            Controls.Add(dgvProducts);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadProductsAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);

                var result = await _productApiService.GetPagedAsync(
                    new PagedQueryRequestDto
                    {
                        PageNumber = 1,
                        PageSize = 200,
                        SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text
                    });

                var list = result.Items.ToList();
                _bindingSource.DataSource = list;

                lblStatus.Text = $"عدد المنتجات: {result.TotalCount}";
                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "حدث خطأ أثناء تحميل المنتجات";
            }
            finally
            {
                SetBusy(false);
            }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvProducts.Columns.Count == 0)
                return;

            HideIfExists("Description");
            HideIfExists("CreatedAt");
            HideIfExists("UpdatedAt");

            SetHeader("ProductId", "ID");
            SetHeader("Code", "الكود");
            SetHeader("Barcode", "الباركود");
            SetHeader("Name", "الاسم");
            SetHeader("CategoryName", "التصنيف");
            SetHeader("UnitName", "الوحدة");
            SetHeader("PurchasePrice", "سعر الشراء");
            SetHeader("SalePrice", "سعر البيع");
            SetHeader("MinStock", "الحد الأدنى");
            SetHeader("IsActive", "نشط");
        }

        private void HideIfExists(string columnName)
        {
            if (dgvProducts.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvProducts.Columns[columnName].Visible = false;
        }

        private void SetHeader(string columnName, string headerText)
        {
            if (dgvProducts.Columns.Contains(columnName))
                dgvProducts.Columns[columnName].HeaderText = headerText;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedProductId()
        {
            if (dgvProducts.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not ProductDto row)
                return null;

            return row.ProductId;
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedProductId();
            if (id is null)
            {
                MessageBox.Show("اختر منتجًا أولًا.");
                return;
            }

            var confirm = MessageBox.Show(
                "هل تريد حذف المنتج؟",
                "تأكيد",
                MessageBoxButtons.YesNo,
                MessageBoxIcon.Question);

            if (confirm != DialogResult.Yes)
                return;

            try
            {
                await _productApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadProductsAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;

            btnSearch.Enabled = !busy;
            btnRefresh.Enabled = !busy;
            btnAdd.Enabled = !busy;
            btnEdit.Enabled = !busy;
            btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
            txtSearch.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 7) استخدام الـ Control داخل `MainForm`
إذا أردت عرض المنتجات داخل نافذة رئيسية:

## `MainForm.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Products;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms
{
    public class MainForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private Panel contentPanel = null!;

        public MainForm(IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;
            InitializeComponent();
            LoadProductsScreen();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "Sales System";
            WindowState = FormWindowState.Maximized;

            contentPanel = new Panel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill
            };

            Controls.Add(contentPanel);
        }

        private void LoadProductsScreen()
        {
            contentPanel.Controls.Clear();

            var control = _serviceProvider.GetRequiredService<ProductsListControl>();
            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            contentPanel.Controls.Add(control);
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 8) تسجيل `MainForm` و `ProductsListControl`
في `Program.cs` تأكد من تسجيلهما:

```csharp
services.AddTransient<ProductsListControl>();
services.AddTransient<MainForm>();
```

---

# 9) كيف يتم التدفق الآن؟
## عند فتح الشاشة:
- `ProductsListControl` ينادي `GET /api/products`

## عند الحذف:
- ينادي `DELETE /api/products/{id}`
- ثم يعمل `Refresh`

## عند الإضافة والتعديل:
- سنضيف `ProductEditorForm` في الخطوة التالية
- وبعد الحفظ:
  - يرجع إلى `ProductsListControl`
  - ثم يعمل `Reload`

---

# 10) ملاحظات مهمة جدًا
## أ) لماذا بدأنا بالمنتجات؟
لأنه أول CRUD بسيط، ويمثل نموذجًا لباقي الشاشات.

## ب) لماذا استخدمنا API Client داخل Desktop؟
لأنك اخترت:
- Desktop + API من البداية  
وهذا ممتاز مستقبلًا.

## ج) ما الخطوة التالية؟
الخطوة الطبيعية التالية هي:

### **ProductEditorForm**
حتى تقدر:
- تضيف منتج
- تعدل منتج
- ثم تعمل Refresh تلقائيًا

---

# 11) نصيحتي الآن
إذا أردت أن نكمل بشكل صحيح، فالخطوة التالية الأفضل هي:

## **بناء ProductEditorForm**
بشكل عملي، مع:
- Create
- Edit
- Validation بسيطة
- ثم Refresh للـ list

---

إذا أردت، سأكمل لك مباشرة في الرسالة القادمة بـ:

# **ProductEditorForm الكامل**
حتى يصبح عندك:
- إضافة
- تعديل
- حذف
- عرض
- وكلها متصلة بالـ API.

ممتاز.  
سأكمل لك الآن **ProductEditorForm** بشكل عملي، لكن قبل ذلك هناك **تعديل مهم جدًا** لازم نعمله في `ProductApiService` حتى لا تواجه خطأ عند `Update` و`Delete`.

---

# 1) تعديل مهم في `ProductApiService`
في النسخة السابقة، `UpdateAsync` و`DeleteAsync` كانا يحاولان قراءة `Data` حتى لو كانت `null`، وهذا قد يسبب مشكلة.

## استبدل `UpdateAsync` و`DeleteAsync` بهذا الشكل:

```csharp
public async Task UpdateAsync(
    int id,
    UpdateProductRequestDto request,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    var response = await _httpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/products/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
    await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
}

public async Task DeleteAsync(
    int id,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
{
    var response = await _httpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/products/{id}", cancellationToken);
    await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
}

private static async Task EnsureSuccessAsync(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
{
    if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
        return;

    var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<object?>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);

    throw new InvalidOperationException(
        payload?.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");
}
```

---

# 2) ProductEditorForm
هذا هو الفورم الخاص بـ:
- إضافة منتج
- تعديل منتج
- الحفظ عبر الـ API

---

## `ProductEditorForm.cs`

```csharp
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Products
{
    public class ProductEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IProductApiService _productApiService;
        private readonly int? _productId;

        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtCode = null!;
        private TextBox txtBarcode = null!;
        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtDescription = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudPurchasePrice = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudSalePrice = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudMinStock = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private CheckBox chkUseCategory = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudCategoryId = null!;
        private CheckBox chkUseUnit = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudUnitId = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;
        private Label lblTitle = null!;

        public ProductEditorForm(IProductApiService productApiService, int? productId = null)
        {
            _productApiService = productApiService;
            _productId = productId;

            InitializeComponent();

            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _productId.HasValue ? "تعديل منتج" : "إضافة منتج";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(800, 650);
            MinimumSize = new Size(750, 600);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false;
            MinimizeBox = false;

            _errorProvider.BlinkStyle = ErrorBlinkStyle.NeverBlink;

            lblTitle = new Label
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 50,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight,
                Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 14, FontStyle.Bold),
                Padding = new Padding(10),
                Text = _productId.HasValue ? "تعديل منتج" : "إضافة منتج جديد"
            };

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Padding = new Padding(12),
                ColumnCount = 2,
                RowCount = 9,
                AutoSize = true
            };

            mainPanel.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50));
            mainPanel.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50));

            // Row 1: Code / Barcode
            txtCode = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "الكود" };
            txtBarcode = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "الباركود" };

            // Row 2: Name
            txtName = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "اسم المنتج" };

            // Row 3: Category / Unit
            chkUseCategory = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "تحديد التصنيف",
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Checked = false
            };
            chkUseCategory.CheckedChanged += (_, _) => nudCategoryId.Enabled = chkUseCategory.Checked;

            nudCategoryId = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Minimum = 1,
                Maximum = 1000000,
                Enabled = false
            };

            chkUseUnit = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "تحديد الوحدة",
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Checked = false
            };
            chkUseUnit.CheckedChanged += (_, _) => nudUnitId.Enabled = chkUseUnit.Checked;

            nudUnitId = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Minimum = 1,
                Maximum = 1000000,
                Enabled = false
            };

            // Row 4: Prices
            nudPurchasePrice = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                DecimalPlaces = 2,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };

            nudSalePrice = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                DecimalPlaces = 2,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };

            // Row 5: Min stock
            nudMinStock = new NumericUpDown
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                DecimalPlaces = 3,
                Minimum = 0,
                Maximum = 100000000,
                ThousandsSeparator = true
            };

            // Row 6: Description
            txtDescription = new TextBox
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                Multiline = true,
                Height = 100,
                ScrollBars = ScrollBars.Vertical,
                PlaceholderText = "الوصف"
            };

            // Row 7: Active
            chkIsActive = new CheckBox
            {
                Text = "نشط",
                Checked = true,
                Dock = DockStyle.Left
            };

            // Buttons
            btnSave = new Button
            {
                Text = "حفظ",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 36
            };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button
            {
                Text = "إلغاء",
                Width = 120,
                Height = 36,
                DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel
            };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight,
                WrapContents = false,
                AutoSize = true
            };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            // Add labeled rows
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("الكود:", txtCode), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(CreateLabeledControl("الكود:", txtCode), 1);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("الباركود:", txtBarcode), 1, 0);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("اسم المنتج:", txtName), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 1), 2);

            var categoryPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            categoryPanel.Controls.Add(nudCategoryId);
            categoryPanel.Controls.Add(chkUseCategory);
            chkUseCategory.Dock = DockStyle.Top;
            nudCategoryId.Dock = DockStyle.Bottom;

            var unitPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            unitPanel.Controls.Add(nudUnitId);
            unitPanel.Controls.Add(chkUseUnit);
            chkUseUnit.Dock = DockStyle.Top;
            nudUnitId.Dock = DockStyle.Bottom;

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateDualPanel("التصنيف:", categoryPanel, "الوحدة:", unitPanel), 0, 2);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 2), 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateDualPanel("سعر الشراء:", nudPurchasePrice, "سعر البيع:", nudSalePrice), 0, 3);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 3), 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("الحد الأدنى للمخزون:", nudMinStock), 0, 4);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 4), 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl("الوصف:", txtDescription), 0, 5);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(mainPanel.GetControlFromPosition(0, 5), 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 6);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(chkIsActive, 2);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 7);
            mainPanel.SetColumnSpan(buttonsPanel, 2);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);
            Controls.Add(lblTitle);

            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledControl(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, Height = 60 };

            var label = new Label
            {
                Text = labelText,
                Dock = DockStyle.Top,
                Height = 22,
                TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleRight
            };

            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;

            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);

            return panel;
        }

        private Panel CreateDualPanel(
            string labelText1, Control control1,
            string labelText2, Control control2)
        {
            var panel = new TableLayoutPanel
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill,
                ColumnCount = 2,
                RowCount = 1
            };

            panel.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50));
            panel.ColumnStyles.Add(new ColumnStyle(SizeType.Percent, 50));

            panel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl(labelText1, control1), 0, 0);
            panel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledControl(labelText2, control2), 1, 0);

            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                if (!_productId.HasValue)
                    return;

                UseWaitCursor = true;

                var product = await _productApiService.GetByIdAsync(_productId.Value);
                if (product is null)
                {
                    MessageBox.Show("المنتج غير موجود.", "تنبيه", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning);
                    Close();
                    return;
                }

                FillForm(product);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                Close();
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
            }
        }

        private void FillForm(ProductDto product)
        {
            txtCode.Text = product.Code ?? string.Empty;
            txtBarcode.Text = product.Barcode ?? string.Empty;
            txtName.Text = product.Name;
            txtDescription.Text = product.Description ?? string.Empty;
            nudPurchasePrice.Value = product.PurchasePrice;
            nudSalePrice.Value = product.SalePrice;
            nudMinStock.Value = product.MinStock;
            chkIsActive.Checked = product.IsActive;

            chkUseCategory.Checked = product.CategoryId.HasValue;
            if (product.CategoryId.HasValue)
                nudCategoryId.Value = product.CategoryId.Value;

            chkUseUnit.Checked = product.UnitId.HasValue;
            if (product.UnitId.HasValue)
                nudUnitId.Value = product.UnitId.Value;
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm())
                return;

            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_productId.HasValue)
                {
                    var request = BuildUpdateRequest();
                    await _productApiService.UpdateAsync(_productId.Value, request);
                    MessageBox.Show("تم تحديث المنتج بنجاح.", "نجاح", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }
                else
                {
                    var request = BuildCreateRequest();
                    await _productApiService.CreateAsync(request);
                    MessageBox.Show("تمت إضافة المنتج بنجاح.", "نجاح", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                }

                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
            }
            finally
            {
                UseWaitCursor = false;
                btnSave.Enabled = true;
            }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);
            _errorProvider.SetError(nudCategoryId, string.Empty);
            _errorProvider.SetError(nudUnitId, string.Empty);

            bool valid = true;

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "اسم المنتج مطلوب.");
                valid = false;
            }

            if (chkUseCategory.Checked && nudCategoryId.Value <= 0)
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(nudCategoryId, "رقم التصنيف غير صحيح.");
                valid = false;
            }

            if (chkUseUnit.Checked && nudUnitId.Value <= 0)
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(nudUnitId, "رقم الوحدة غير صحيح.");
                valid = false;
            }

            return valid;
        }

        private CreateProductRequestDto BuildCreateRequest()
        {
            return new CreateProductRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Barcode = TrimToNull(txtBarcode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                CategoryId = chkUseCategory.Checked ? (int?)nudCategoryId.Value : null,
                UnitId = chkUseUnit.Checked ? (int?)nudUnitId.Value : null,
                PurchasePrice = nudPurchasePrice.Value,
                SalePrice = nudSalePrice.Value,
                MinStock = nudMinStock.Value,
                Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private UpdateProductRequestDto BuildUpdateRequest()
        {
            return new UpdateProductRequestDto
            {
                Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text),
                Barcode = TrimToNull(txtBarcode.Text),
                Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                CategoryId = chkUseCategory.Checked ? (int?)nudCategoryId.Value : null,
                UnitId = chkUseUnit.Checked ? (int?)nudUnitId.Value : null,
                PurchasePrice = nudPurchasePrice.Value,
                SalePrice = nudSalePrice.Value,
                MinStock = nudMinStock.Value,
                Description = TrimToNull(txtDescription.Text),
                IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
            };
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))
                return null;

            return value.Trim();
        }
    }
}
```

---

# 3) تحديث `ProductsListControl`
الآن بدل رسائل الـ placeholders، نخلي الشاشات تفتح الفورم الحقيقي.

## أضف هذا `using`:
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Products;
```

## ثم استبدل زر الإضافة والتعديل والنقر المزدوج بهذا:

```csharp
btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
{
    var id = GetSelectedProductId();
    if (id is null)
    {
        MessageBox.Show("اختر منتجًا أولًا.");
        return;
    }

    await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
};

dgvProducts.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
{
    var id = GetSelectedProductId();
    if (id is null)
        return;

    await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
};
```

## وأضف هذه الدالة داخل `ProductsListControl`:

```csharp
private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? productId)
{
    using var form = new ProductEditorForm(_productApiService, productId);

    var owner = FindForm();
    var result = owner is not null
        ? form.ShowDialog(owner)
        : form.ShowDialog();

    if (result == DialogResult.OK)
        await LoadProductsAsync();
}
```

---

# 4) ماذا حققنا الآن؟
أصبح عندك الآن مسار كامل:

- فتح قائمة المنتجات
- عرض البيانات من الـ API
- إضافة منتج جديد
- تعديل منتج موجود
- الحفظ في SQL Server عبر API
- تحديث القائمة بعد الحفظ

---

# 5) ملاحظة مهمة جدًا
الـ `CategoryId` و `UnitId` حاليًا يدخلان كأرقام.

## هذا مناسب مؤقتًا
لكن لاحقًا الأفضل أن نضيف:
- `CategoriesApiService`
- `UnitsApiService`

ثم نستبدل الرقم بـ:
- `ComboBox`
- وقائمة حقيقية من التصنيفات والوحدات

وهذا سيكون **تحسين واجهة** وليس تغييرًا في المنطق.

---

# 6) الخطوة التالية المنطقية
بعد نجاح منتج واحد، ننتقل إلى:

## أحد الخيارين:
1. **Product Lookup Services**
   - التصنيفات
   - الوحدات
   - المخازن

2. **SalesEditorForm**
   - شاشة البيع الكاملة
   - مع اختيار المنتج والعميل والمخزن
   - وحساب الإجماليات

---

إذا أردت، أستطيع الآن أن أكمل لك مباشرة بـ:

# **Categories + Units API Services and ComboBox Loading**
حتى يصبح ProductEditorForm احترافيًا أكثر بدون إدخال أرقام يدويًا.


ممتاز جدًا.  
الخطوة التالية الصحيحة هي: **استبدال إدخال `CategoryId` و `UnitId` يدويًا بـ ComboBox تُحمّل من الـ API**.

هذا سيجعل شاشة المنتج:
- أسهل للمستخدم
- أقل أخطاء
- أكثر احترافية
- وجاهزة لباقي الشاشات بنفس الأسلوب

---

# 1) DTOs للـ Lookup

أضف هذه في مشروع:

## `SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories`

### `CategoryLookupDto.cs`
```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories
{
    public class CategoryLookupDto
    {
        public int CategoryId { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    }
}
```

---

## `SalesSystem.Contracts.Units`

### `UnitLookupDto.cs`
```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Contracts.Units
{
    public class UnitLookupDto
    {
        public int UnitId { get; set; }
        public string Name { get; set; } = string.Empty;
        public string? Symbol { get; set; }
    }
}
```

---

# 2) Application Interfaces

## `ICategoryService`

# 4) Application Services

## `CategoryService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class CategoryService : ICategoryService
    {
        private readonly ICategoryRepository _repository;

        public CategoryService(ICategoryRepository repository)
        {
            _repository = repository;
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            var result = items
                .Select(x => new CategoryLookupDto
                {
                    CategoryId = x.CategoryId,
                    Name = x.Name
                })
                .ToList()
                .AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Success(result);
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitService.cs`
```csharp
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class UnitService : IUnitService
    {
        private readonly IUnitRepository _repository;

        public UnitService(IUnitRepository repository)
        {
            _repository = repository;
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            var result = items
                .Select(x => new UnitLookupDto
                {
                    UnitId = x.UnitId,
                    Name = x.Name,
                    Symbol = x.Symbol
                })
                .ToList()
                .AsReadOnly();

            return Result<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>.Success(result);
        }
    }
}
```

# 5) Infrastructure Repositories

## `CategoryRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class CategoryRepository : ICategoryRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public CategoryRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Category>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Categories
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x => x.Name.Contains(searchTerm));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitRepository.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class UnitRepository : IUnitRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public UnitRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Unit>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Units
                .AsNoTracking()
                .Where(x => x.IsActive)
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x => x.Name.Contains(searchTerm));
            }

            return await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

# 6) API Controllers

## `CategoriesController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/categories")]
    public class CategoriesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ICategoryService _categoryService;

        public CategoriesController(ICategoryService categoryService)
        {
            _categoryService = categoryService;
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _categoryService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```

## `UnitsController.cs`
```csharp
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Units;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/units")]
    public class UnitsController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IUnitService _unitService;

        public UnitsController(IUnitService unitService)
        {
            _unitService = unitService;
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _unitService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);

            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<UnitLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }
    }
}
```

# 8) Desktop API Services

أفضل شيء هنا أن نعمل **Service Base** لإعادة الاستخدام.

## `ApiServiceBase.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public abstract class ApiServiceBase
    {
        protected readonly HttpClient HttpClient;

        protected ApiServiceBase(HttpClient httpClient)
        {
            HttpClient = httpClient;
        }

        protected static string BuildSearchQuery(string? searchTerm)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
                return string.Empty;

            return $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";
        }

        protected static async Task<T> ReadAsync<T>(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<T>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);

            if (payload is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("الرد من السيرفر فارغ.");

            if (!response.IsSuccessStatusCode || !payload.IsSuccess)
                throw new InvalidOperationException(payload.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");

            if (payload.Data is null)
                throw new InvalidOperationException("لا توجد بيانات في الرد.");

            return payload.Data;
        }

        protected static async Task EnsureSuccessAsync(HttpResponseMessage response, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
                return;

            var payload = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<ApiResponseDto<object?>>(cancellationToken: cancellationToken);
            throw new InvalidOperationException(payload?.Message ?? $"API Error: {response.StatusCode}");
        }
    }
}
```

---

```csharp
namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
```

## `CategoryApiService.cs`
```csharp
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Categories;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class CategoryApiService : ApiServiceBase, ICategoryApiService
    {
        public CategoryApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/categories/lookup{BuildSearchQuery(searchTerm)}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<CategoryLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
```

# 9) تحديث ProductApiService
اجعله يرث من `ApiServiceBase` أيضًا، واستبدل `BuildSearchQuery` وقراءة الردود إن أردت لاحقًا.  
ليس شرطًا الآن، لكنه أفضل تنظيمًا.

---

# 10) تعديل `Program.cs` في Desktop

أضف تسجيل الخدمات الجديدة:

```csharp
services.AddHttpClient<IProductApiService, ProductApiService>(client =>
{
    client.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl);
});

services.AddHttpClient<ICategoryApiService, CategoryApiService>(client =>
{
    client.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl);
});

services.AddHttpClient<IUnitApiService, UnitApiService>(client =>
{
    client.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl);
});

services.AddTransient<ProductEditorForm>();
services.AddTransient<ProductsListControl>();
```
