        Task<IReadOnlyList<Supplier>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        
        Task<Supplier?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        
        Task AddAsync(Supplier entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        
        Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(
            string code, int? excludeSupplierId = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
ISupplierService.cs
واجهة الخدمة التي ستوفرها طبقة Application للـ API للتعامل مع الموردين.
C#
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services
{
    public interface ISupplierService
    {
        Task<Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result<SupplierDto?>> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result> UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result> DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
SupplierMappingProfile.cs
ملف إعدادات AutoMapper لتحويل البيانات بين الـ Entities والـ DTOs الخاصة بالموردين.
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Mapping
{
    public class SupplierMappingProfile : Profile
    {
        public SupplierMappingProfile()
        {
            CreateMap<Supplier, SupplierDto>();
            CreateMap<Supplier, SupplierLookupDto>();

            CreateMap<CreateSupplierRequestDto, Supplier>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.MapFrom(s => s.OpeningBalance)) // يبدأ بالرصيد الافتتاحي
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());

            CreateMap<UpdateSupplierRequestDto, Supplier>()
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierId, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.OpeningBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CurrentBalance, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.PurchaseInvoices, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.SupplierPayments, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.CreatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore())
                .ForMember(d => d.UpdatedAt, opt => opt.Ignore());
        }
    }
}
SupplierService.cs
التطبيق الفعلي لخدمة الموردين، هنا يوجد منطق الأعمال (Business Logic) وعمليات التحقق.
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class SupplierService : ISupplierService
    {
        private readonly ISupplierRepository _repository;
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public SupplierService(ISupplierRepository repository, IUnitOfWork unitOfWork, IMapper mapper)
        {
            _repository = repository;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _repository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm, request.PageNumber, request.PageSize, cancellationToken);

            var dtoItems = _mapper.Map<List<SupplierDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>.Success(new PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>
            {
                Items = dtoItems, TotalCount = totalCount,
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize
            });
        }

        public async Task<Result<SupplierDto?>> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null) return Result<SupplierDto?>.Failure("Supplier not found.");
            return Result<SupplierDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<SupplierDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name)) return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier name is required.");
            if (code is not null && await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, null, cancellationToken))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier code already exists.");

            var entity = _mapper.Map<Supplier>(request);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Email = Normalize(request.Email);
            entity.Phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            entity.Address = Normalize(request.Address);
            entity.CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _repository.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result<int>.Success(entity.SupplierId);
        }

        public async Task<Result> UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null) return Result.Failure("Supplier not found.");

            var name = Normalize(request.Name);
            var code = Normalize(request.Code);

            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name)) return Result.Failure("Supplier name is required.");
            if (code is not null && await _repository.ExistsByCodeAsync(code, id, cancellationToken))
                return Result.Failure("Supplier code already exists.");

            _mapper.Map(request, entity);
            entity.Name = name;
            entity.Code = code;
            entity.Email = Normalize(request.Email);
            entity.Phone = Normalize(request.Phone);
            entity.Address = Normalize(request.Address);
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result> DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _repository.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null) return Result.Failure("Supplier not found.");

            // Soft Delete
            entity.IsActive = false;
            entity.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

            await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

            return Result.Success();
        }

        public async Task<Result<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>> GetLookupAsync(string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var items = await _repository.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            return Result<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>.Success(_mapper.Map<List<SupplierLookupDto>>(items).AsReadOnly());
        }

        private static string? Normalize(string? value) => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? null : value.Trim();
    }
}

3. طبقة Infrastructure (قواعد البيانات)
ضع هذا الملف في SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories.
SupplierRepository.cs
التطبيق الفعلي للتواصل مع قاعدة البيانات لعمليات الموردين باستخدام EF Core.
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class SupplierRepository : ISupplierRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public SupplierRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<Supplier> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm, int pageNumber, int pageSize, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Suppliers.AsNoTracking().AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Code != null && x.Code.Contains(searchTerm)) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);
            var items = await query
                .OrderBy(x => x.Name)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<Supplier>> GetLookupAsync(
            string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Suppliers.AsNoTracking().Where(x => x.IsActive).AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.Name.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Phone != null && x.Phone.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            return await query.OrderBy(x => x.Name).ToListAsync(cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<Supplier?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.Suppliers.FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.SupplierId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(Supplier entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.Suppliers.AddAsync(entity, cancellationToken);
        }

        public Task<bool> ExistsByCodeAsync(string code, int? excludeSupplierId = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.Suppliers.AsQueryable().Where(x => x.Code == code);
            if (excludeSupplierId.HasValue) query = query.Where(x => x.SupplierId != excludeSupplierId.Value);
            return query.AnyAsync(cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}

4. طبقة API (متحكم الموردين)
ضع هذا الملف في SalesSystem.Api/Controllers.
SuppliersController.cs
المتحكم (Controller) الذي يعرض خدمات الموردين كـ RESTful endpoints.
C#
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/suppliers")]
    public class SuppliersController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly ISupplierService _supplierService;

        public SuppliersController(ISupplierService supplierService)
        {
            _supplierService = supplierService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest { PageNumber = request.PageNumber, PageSize = request.PageSize, SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm };
            var result = await _supplierService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<SupplierDto?>>> GetById(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<SupplierDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<SupplierDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpGet("lookup")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>>> Lookup(
            [FromQuery] string? searchTerm, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.GetLookupAsync(searchTerm, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create([FromBody] CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return CreatedAtAction(nameof(GetById), new { id = result.Data }, ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Supplier created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPut("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Update(int id, [FromBody] UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.UpdateAsync(id, request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Supplier updated successfully"));
        }

        [HttpDelete("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Delete(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _supplierService.DeleteAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure) return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));
            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Supplier deleted successfully"));
        }
    }
}

5. طبقة Desktop (الواجهات والخدمات)
ISupplierApiService.cs & SupplierApiService.cs
خدمة الـ Desktop للاتصال بالـ API الخاص بالموردين.
C#
// SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api/ISupplierApiService.cs
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface ISupplierApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<SupplierDto?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        Task DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}

// SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api/SupplierApiService.cs
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class SupplierApiService : ApiServiceBase, ISupplierApiService
    {
        public SupplierApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>> GetPagedAsync(PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/suppliers?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm)) url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<SupplierDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>> GetLookupAsync(string? searchTerm = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = "api/suppliers/lookup";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm)) url += $"?searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(searchTerm.Trim())}";
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<IReadOnlyList<SupplierLookupDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<SupplierDto?> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<SupplierDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(CreateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/suppliers", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task UpdateAsync(int id, UpdateSupplierRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PutAsJsonAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}", request, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task DeleteAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.DeleteAsync($"api/suppliers/{id}", cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}
SuppliersListControl.cs
شاشة عرض قائمة الموردين (UserControl).
C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Suppliers
{
    public class SuppliersListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly ISupplierApiService _supplierApiService;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnEdit = null!;
        private Button btnDelete = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvSuppliers = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public SuppliersListControl(ISupplierApiService supplierApiService)
        {
            _supplierApiService = supplierApiService;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadSuppliersAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };

            txtSearch = new TextBox { Width = 260, PlaceholderText = "ابحث باسم المورد أو الكود أو الهاتف..." };
            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "بحث", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadSuppliersAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "تحديث", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) => { txtSearch.Clear(); await LoadSuppliersAsync(); };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "إضافة", Width = 80 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync(null);

            btnEdit = new Button { Text = "تعديل", Width = 80 };
            btnEdit.Click += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
                if (id is null) { MessageBox.Show("اختر مورداً أولاً."); return; }
                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            btnDelete = new Button { Text = "حذف", Width = 80 };
            btnDelete.Click += async (_, _) => await DeleteSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 400, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft, WrapContents = false };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { btnDelete, btnEdit, btnAdd, btnRefresh, btnSearch });

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, WrapContents = false };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvSuppliers = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false, AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, MultiSelect = false, AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvSuppliers.DataSource = _bindingSource;
            dgvSuppliers.CellDoubleClick += async (_, _) =>
            {
                var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
                if (id is null) return;
                await OpenEditorAsync(id.Value);
            };

            lblStatus = new Label { Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 24, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft, Text = "جاهز" };

            Controls.Add(dgvSuppliers);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadSuppliersAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);
                var result = await _supplierApiService.GetPagedAsync(new PagedQueryRequestDto { PageNumber = 1, PageSize = 200, SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text });
                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"عدد الموردين: {result.TotalCount}";
                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error);
                lblStatus.Text = "حدث خطأ أثناء تحميل الموردين";
            }
            finally { SetBusy(false); }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Count == 0) return;

            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("SupplierId")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["SupplierId"].HeaderText = "ID";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Code")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Code"].HeaderText = "الكود";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Name")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Name"].HeaderText = "الاسم";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Phone")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Phone"].HeaderText = "الهاتف";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("CurrentBalance")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["CurrentBalance"].HeaderText = "الرصيد الحالي";
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("IsActive")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["IsActive"].HeaderText = "نشط";
            
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Email")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Email"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("Address")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["Address"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("OpeningBalance")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["OpeningBalance"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("CreatedAt")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["CreatedAt"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvSuppliers.Columns.Contains("UpdatedAt")) dgvSuppliers.Columns["UpdatedAt"].Visible = false;
        }

        private int? GetSelectedSupplierId()
        {
            if (dgvSuppliers.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not SupplierDto row) return null;
            return row.SupplierId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync(int? supplierId)
        {
            using var form = new SupplierEditorForm(_supplierApiService, supplierId);
            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();
            if (result == DialogResult.OK) await LoadSuppliersAsync();
        }

        private async Task DeleteSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedSupplierId();
            if (id is null) { MessageBox.Show("اختر مورداً أولاً."); return; }
            if (MessageBox.Show("هل تريد حذف المورد؟", "تأكيد", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Question) != DialogResult.Yes) return;

            try
            {
                await _supplierApiService.DeleteAsync(id.Value);
                await LoadSuppliersAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;
            txtSearch.Enabled = btnSearch.Enabled = btnRefresh.Enabled = btnAdd.Enabled = btnEdit.Enabled = btnDelete.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}
SupplierEditorForm.cs
نافذة إضافة وتعديل بيانات المورد.
C#
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Suppliers
{
    public class SupplierEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly ISupplierApiService _supplierApiService;
        private readonly int? _supplierId;
        private readonly ErrorProvider _errorProvider = new();

        private TextBox txtCode = null!;
        private TextBox txtName = null!;
        private TextBox txtPhone = null!;
        private TextBox txtEmail = null!;
        private TextBox txtAddress = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudOpeningBalance = null!;
        private CheckBox chkIsActive = null!;
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public SupplierEditorForm(ISupplierApiService supplierApiService, int? supplierId = null)
        {
            _supplierApiService = supplierApiService;
            _supplierId = supplierId;
            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadFormAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = _supplierId.HasValue ? "تعديل مورد" : "إضافة مورد";
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            Size = new Size(600, 480);
            MinimumSize = new Size(550, 450);
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog;
            MaximizeBox = false; MinimizeBox = false;

            var mainPanel = new TableLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, Padding = new Padding(12), ColumnCount = 1, RowCount = 8 };
            for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 45));
            mainPanel.RowStyles.Add(new RowStyle(SizeType.Absolute, 50));

            txtCode = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "الكود" };
            txtName = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "اسم المورد" };
            txtPhone = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "رقم الهاتف" };
            txtEmail = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "البريد الإلكتروني" };
            txtAddress = new TextBox { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, PlaceholderText = "العنوان" };
            
            nudOpeningBalance = new NumericUpDown { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, DecimalPlaces = 2, Minimum = 0, Maximum = 100000000, ThousandsSeparator = true };
            chkIsActive = new CheckBox { Text = "نشط", Checked = true, Dock = DockStyle.Left };

            btnSave = new Button { Text = "حفظ", Width = 120, Height = 35 };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveAsync();

            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "إلغاء", Width = 120, Height = 35, DialogResult = DialogResult.Cancel };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, WrapContents = false };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnSave);
            buttonsPanel.Controls.Add(btnCancel);

            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("الكود:", txtCode), 0, 0);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("اسم المورد:", txtName), 0, 1);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("الهاتف:", txtPhone), 0, 2);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("البريد:", txtEmail), 0, 3);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("العنوان:", txtAddress), 0, 4);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(CreateLabeledPanel("الرصيد الافتتاحي:", nudOpeningBalance), 0, 5);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(chkIsActive, 0, 6);
            mainPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel, 0, 7);

            Controls.Add(mainPanel);
            AcceptButton = btnSave;
            CancelButton = btnCancel;
        }

        private Panel CreateLabeledPanel(string labelText, Control control)
        {
            var panel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill };
            var label = new Label { Text = labelText, Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 120, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft };
            control.Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            panel.Controls.Add(control);
            panel.Controls.Add(label);
            return panel;
        }

        private async Task LoadFormAsync()
        {
            if (!_supplierId.HasValue) return;
            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                var supplier = await _supplierApiService.GetByIdAsync(_supplierId.Value);
                if (supplier is null) { MessageBox.Show("المورد غير موجود.", "تنبيه", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Warning); Close(); return; }

                txtCode.Text = supplier.Code ?? string.Empty;
                txtName.Text = supplier.Name;
                txtPhone.Text = supplier.Phone ?? string.Empty;
                txtEmail.Text = supplier.Email ?? string.Empty;
                txtAddress.Text = supplier.Address ?? string.Empty;
                nudOpeningBalance.Value = supplier.OpeningBalance;
                nudOpeningBalance.Enabled = false; 
                chkIsActive.Checked = supplier.IsActive;
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); Close(); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; }
        }

        private async Task SaveAsync()
        {
            if (!ValidateForm()) return;
            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                btnSave.Enabled = false;

                if (_supplierId.HasValue)
                {
                    await _supplierApiService.UpdateAsync(_supplierId.Value, new UpdateSupplierRequestDto
                    {
                        Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text), Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                        Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text), Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                        Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text), IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
                    });
                }
                else
                {
                    await _supplierApiService.CreateAsync(new CreateSupplierRequestDto
                    {
                        Code = TrimToNull(txtCode.Text), Name = txtName.Text.Trim(),
                        Phone = TrimToNull(txtPhone.Text), Email = TrimToNull(txtEmail.Text),
                        Address = TrimToNull(txtAddress.Text), OpeningBalance = nudOpeningBalance.Value,
                        IsActive = chkIsActive.Checked
                    });
                }

                MessageBox.Show("تم الحفظ بنجاح.", "نجاح", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                DialogResult = DialogResult.OK;
                Close();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; btnSave.Enabled = true; }
        }

        private bool ValidateForm()
        {
            _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, string.Empty);
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(txtName.Text))
            {
                _errorProvider.SetError(txtName, "اسم المورد مطلوب.");
                return false;
            }
            return true;
        }

        private static string? TrimToNull(string? value) => string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value) ? null : value.Trim();
    }
}

6. تسجيل الـ Dependency Injection (الموردين)
في SalesSystem.Application/DependencyInjection.cs:
C#
services.AddScoped<ISupplierService, SupplierService>();
في SalesSystem.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs:
C#
services.AddScoped<ISupplierRepository, SupplierRepository>();
في SalesSystem.Desktop/Program.cs:
C#
services.AddHttpClient<ISupplierApiService, SupplierApiService>(client =>
{
    client.BaseAddress = new Uri(baseUrl); // تأكد أن baseUrl معرفة لديك كما في الكود السابق
});
services.AddTransient<SuppliersListControl>();
services.AddTransient<SupplierEditorForm>();
بهذا نكون قد أكملنا موديول الموردين (Suppliers Module) بكل طبقاته وتفاصيله.
هل أنت مستعد الآن لندخل في العيار الثقيل ونبدأ في بناء موديول المشتريات (Purchases Module)؟


ممتاز، بطل! الآن ندخل في "العيار الثقيل": موديول المشتريات (Purchases Module).
هذا الموديول يختلف عن الموديويلات السابقة (التي كانت مجرد CRUD بسيط)، لأنه يحتوي على منطق أعمال (Business Logic) معقد يشمل:
* حفظ الفاتورة وعناصرها.
* زيادة المخزون في المخزن المحدد.
* تسجيل حركة المخزون (InventoryMovement).
* زيادة مديونية المورد (إذا كانت الفاتورة آجلة أو جزء منها آجل).
* استخدام الـ Transactions لضمان أنه إما أن يتم حفظ كل شيء بنجاح، أو التراجع عن كل شيء في حال حدوث خطأ.
(ملاحظة: لقد قمنا مسبقاً بإنشاء الـ DTOs الخاصة بالمشتريات وملفات الـ Mapping، لذا سنركز هنا على الخدمات وقواعد البيانات ومتحكم الـ API. واجهة سطح المكتب سنفرد لها الرسالة القادمة لأن شاشتها Master-Detail معقدة).
إليك كود الباك إند (Backend) الكامل لموديول المشتريات:

1. طبقة Application (الواجهات)
ضع هذه الملفات في SalesSystem.Application/Abstractions/Persistence و SalesSystem.Application/Abstractions/Services.
IPurchaseInvoiceRepository.cs
C#
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence
{
    public interface IPurchaseInvoiceRepository
    {
        Task AddAsync(PurchaseInvoice invoice, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        
        Task<PurchaseInvoice?> GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
        
        Task<(IReadOnlyList<PurchaseInvoice> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm, int pageNumber, int pageSize, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
IPurchaseService.cs
C#
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Purchases;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services
{
    public interface IPurchaseService
    {
        Task<Result<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task<Result<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>> GetByIdAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task<Result> CancelAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}

2. طبقة Application (التنفيذ الفعلي - المنطق المحاسبي والمخزني)
هذا هو قلب النظام للمشتريات. ضعه في SalesSystem.Application/Services.
PurchaseService.cs
C#
using AutoMapper;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Enums;

namespace SalesSystem.Application.Services
{
    public class PurchaseService : IPurchaseService
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseInvoiceRepository _purchaseInvoiceRepository;
        private readonly IProductRepository _productRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseRepository _warehouseRepository;
        private readonly ISupplierRepository _supplierRepository;
        private readonly IWarehouseStockRepository _warehouseStockRepository;
        private readonly IInventoryMovementRepository _inventoryMovementRepository;
        private readonly IInvoiceNumberGenerator _invoiceNumberGenerator; // (نستخدم نفس مولد الأرقام الذي استخدمناه للمبيعات مع تغيير البادئة)
        private readonly IUnitOfWork _unitOfWork;
        private readonly IMapper _mapper;

        public PurchaseService(
            IPurchaseInvoiceRepository purchaseInvoiceRepository,
            IProductRepository productRepository,
            IWarehouseRepository warehouseRepository,
            ISupplierRepository supplierRepository,
            IWarehouseStockRepository warehouseStockRepository,
            IInventoryMovementRepository inventoryMovementRepository,
            IInvoiceNumberGenerator invoiceNumberGenerator,
            IUnitOfWork unitOfWork,
            IMapper mapper)
        {
            _purchaseInvoiceRepository = purchaseInvoiceRepository;
            _productRepository = productRepository;
            _warehouseRepository = warehouseRepository;
            _supplierRepository = supplierRepository;
            _warehouseStockRepository = warehouseStockRepository;
            _inventoryMovementRepository = inventoryMovementRepository;
            _invoiceNumberGenerator = invoiceNumberGenerator;
            _unitOfWork = unitOfWork;
            _mapper = mapper;
        }

        public async Task<Result<int>> CreateAsync(
            CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            // 1. التحقق من صحة البيانات الأساسية
            if (request.Items == null || request.Items.Count == 0)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Invoice must contain at least one item.");

            var supplier = await _supplierRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.SupplierId, cancellationToken);
            if (supplier is null || !supplier.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Supplier not found or inactive.");

            var warehouse = await _warehouseRepository.GetByIdAsync(request.WarehouseId, cancellationToken);
            if (warehouse is null || !warehouse.IsActive)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Warehouse not found or inactive.");

            if (request.PaymentType != InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash && !request.DueDate.HasValue)
                return Result<int>.Failure("Due date is required for credit or mixed purchases.");

            // 2. تجهيز البنود وحساب الإجماليات
            var invoiceItems = new List<PurchaseInvoiceItem>();
            decimal subTotal = 0m;

            foreach (var item in request.Items)
            {
                var product = await _productRepository.GetByIdAsync(item.ProductId, cancellationToken);
                if (product is null || !product.IsActive)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Product not found or inactive. ProductId={item.ProductId}");

                var lineGross = item.Quantity * item.UnitCost;
                var lineTotal = lineGross - item.DiscountAmount;

                if (lineTotal < 0)
                    return Result<int>.Failure($"Invalid line total for product '{product.Name}'.");

                invoiceItems.Add(new PurchaseInvoiceItem
                {
                    ProductId = product.ProductId,
                    Quantity = item.Quantity,
                    UnitCost = item.UnitCost,
                    DiscountAmount = item.DiscountAmount,
                    LineTotal = lineTotal,
                    Notes = item.Notes
                });

                subTotal += lineTotal;
            }

            // 3. حساب الإجمالي النهائي والدفع
            var totalAmount = subTotal - request.DiscountAmount + request.TaxAmount;
            if (totalAmount < 0) return Result<int>.Failure("Total amount cannot be negative.");

            decimal paidAmount = request.PaymentType switch
            {
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash => totalAmount,
                InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit => 0m,
                _ => request.PaidAmount
            };

            if (request.PaymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed && (paidAmount < 0m || paidAmount > totalAmount))
                return Result<int>.Failure("Paid amount for mixed invoice must be between 0 and total amount.");

            var dueAmount = totalAmount - paidAmount;

            // 4. فتح Transaction لضمان سلامة قاعدة البيانات
            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                // توليد رقم الفاتورة (مثلا يبدأ بـ PUR-001)
                var invoiceNo = await _invoiceNumberGenerator.GenerateSalesInvoiceNoAsync(cancellationToken); // يفضل عمل دالة GeneratePurchaseInvoiceNoAsync
                
                var invoice = new PurchaseInvoice
                {
                    InvoiceNo = "PUR-" + invoiceNo.Replace("INV-", ""), // تعديل سريع لبادئة المشتريات
                    SupplierId = request.SupplierId,
                    WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                    InvoiceDate = request.InvoiceDate,
                    DueDate = request.DueDate.HasValue ? DateOnly.FromDateTime(request.DueDate.Value) : null,
                    PaymentType = (InvoicePaymentType)request.PaymentType,
                    SubTotal = subTotal,
                    DiscountAmount = request.DiscountAmount,
                    TaxAmount = request.TaxAmount,
                    TotalAmount = totalAmount,
                    PaidAmount = paidAmount,
                    DueAmount = dueAmount,
                    Notes = request.Notes,
                    Status = InvoiceStatus.Posted,
                    CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
                    Items = invoiceItems
                };

                await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.AddAsync(invoice, cancellationToken);
                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

                // 5. زيادة المخزون وتسجيل الحركات
                foreach (var item in invoiceItems)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        request.WarehouseId, item.ProductId, cancellationToken);

                    if (stock is null)
                    {
                        stock = new WarehouseStock
                        {
                            WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                            ProductId = item.ProductId,
                            Quantity = 0m,
                            UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow
                        };
                        await _warehouseStockRepository.AddAsync(stock, cancellationToken);
                    }

                    stock.Quantity += item.Quantity; // زيادة المخزون
                    stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(new InventoryMovement
                    {
                        ProductId = item.ProductId,
                        WarehouseId = request.WarehouseId,
                        MovementType = InventoryMovementType.PurchaseIn, // حركة دخول مشتريات
                        ReferenceType = "PurchaseInvoice",
                        ReferenceId = invoice.PurchaseInvoiceId,
                        Quantity = item.Quantity,
                        UnitCost = item.UnitCost,
                        MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                        Notes = "Purchase invoice stock in"
                    }, cancellationToken);
                }

                // 6. تحديث رصيد المورد (إذا كان هناك مبلغ متبقي)
                if (dueAmount > 0m)
                {
                    supplier.CurrentBalance += dueAmount; // زيادة مديونيتنا للمورد
                    supplier.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                }

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result<int>.Success(invoice.PurchaseInvoiceId);
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result> CancelAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var invoice = await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (invoice is null) return Result.Failure("Purchase invoice not found.");
            if (invoice.Status == InvoiceStatus.Cancelled) return Result.Success();

            await using var transaction = await _unitOfWork.BeginTransactionAsync(cancellationToken);
            try
            {
                // 1. خصم المخزون الذي تم شراؤه
                foreach (var item in invoice.Items)
                {
                    var stock = await _warehouseStockRepository.GetByWarehouseAndProductAsync(
                        invoice.WarehouseId, item.ProductId, cancellationToken);

                    if (stock != null)
                    {
                        stock.Quantity -= item.Quantity;
                        stock.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                    }

                    await _inventoryMovementRepository.AddAsync(new InventoryMovement
                    {
                        ProductId = item.ProductId,
                        WarehouseId = invoice.WarehouseId,
                        MovementType = InventoryMovementType.PurchaseReturnOut, // نعتبرها كأنها خرجت
                        ReferenceType = "PurchaseInvoiceCancel",
                        ReferenceId = invoice.PurchaseInvoiceId,
                        Quantity = item.Quantity,
                        UnitCost = item.UnitCost,
                        MovementDate = DateTime.UtcNow,
                        Notes = "Cancel purchase invoice - stock reversed"
                    }, cancellationToken);
                }

                // 2. عكس رصيد المورد
                if (invoice.DueAmount > 0m)
                {
                    var supplier = await _supplierRepository.GetByIdAsync(invoice.SupplierId, cancellationToken);
                    if (supplier is not null)
                    {
                        supplier.CurrentBalance -= invoice.DueAmount;
                        supplier.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;
                    }
                }

                invoice.Status = InvoiceStatus.Cancelled;
                invoice.UpdatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow;

                await _unitOfWork.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
                await transaction.CommitAsync(cancellationToken);

                return Result.Success();
            }
            catch
            {
                await transaction.RollbackAsync(cancellationToken);
                throw;
            }
        }

        public async Task<Result<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>> GetByIdAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var entity = await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (entity is null) return Result<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>.Failure("Purchase invoice not found.");
            
            return Result<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>.Success(_mapper.Map<PurchaseInvoiceDto>(entity));
        }

        public async Task<Result<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequest request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var (items, totalCount) = await _purchaseInvoiceRepository.GetPagedAsync(
                request.SearchTerm, request.PageNumber, request.PageSize, cancellationToken);

            var mappedItems = _mapper.Map<List<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>(items);

            return Result<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>.Success(new PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>
            {
                Items = mappedItems,
                TotalCount = totalCount,
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize
            });
        }
    }
}

3. طبقة Infrastructure (قواعد البيانات)
ضع هذا الملف في SalesSystem.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories.
PurchaseInvoiceRepository.cs
C#
using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Persistence;
using SalesSystem.Domain.Entities;

namespace SalesSystem.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories
{
    public class PurchaseInvoiceRepository : IPurchaseInvoiceRepository
    {
        private readonly SalesSystemDbContext _context;

        public PurchaseInvoiceRepository(SalesSystemDbContext context)
        {
            _context = context;
        }

        public async Task AddAsync(PurchaseInvoice invoice, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            await _context.PurchaseInvoices.AddAsync(invoice, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<PurchaseInvoice?> GetByIdWithDetailsAsync(int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return await _context.PurchaseInvoices
                .Include(x => x.Supplier)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .Include(x => x.Items)
                    .ThenInclude(i => i.Product)
                .FirstOrDefaultAsync(x => x.PurchaseInvoiceId == id, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<(IReadOnlyList<PurchaseInvoice> Items, int TotalCount)> GetPagedAsync(
            string? searchTerm, int pageNumber, int pageSize, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var query = _context.PurchaseInvoices
                .Include(x => x.Supplier)
                .Include(x => x.Warehouse)
                .AsNoTracking()
                .AsQueryable();

            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
            {
                searchTerm = searchTerm.Trim();
                query = query.Where(x =>
                    x.InvoiceNo.Contains(searchTerm) ||
                    (x.Supplier != null && x.Supplier.Name.Contains(searchTerm)));
            }

            var totalCount = await query.CountAsync(cancellationToken);
            var items = await query
                .OrderByDescending(x => x.InvoiceDate)
                .Skip((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
                .Take(pageSize)
                .ToListAsync(cancellationToken);

            return (items, totalCount);
        }
    }
}

4. طبقة API (متحكم المشتريات)
ضع هذا الملف في SalesSystem.Api/Controllers.
PurchasesController.cs
C#
using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;
using SalesSystem.Application.Abstractions.Services;
using SalesSystem.Application.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Purchases;

namespace SalesSystem.Api.Controllers
{
    [Route("api/purchases")]
    public class PurchasesController : BaseApiController
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseService _purchaseService;

        public PurchasesController(IPurchaseService purchaseService)
        {
            _purchaseService = purchaseService;
        }

        [HttpGet]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>>> GetPaged(
            [FromQuery] PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var appRequest = new PagedQueryRequest
            {
                PageNumber = request.PageNumber,
                PageSize = request.PageSize,
                SearchTerm = request.SearchTerm
            };

            var result = await _purchaseService.GetPagedAsync(appRequest, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>.Success(result.Data!));
        }

        [HttpGet("{id:int}")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>>> GetById(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _purchaseService.GetByIdAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<PurchaseInvoiceDto?>.Success(result.Data));
        }

        [HttpPost]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<int>>> Create(
            [FromBody] CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _purchaseService.CreateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<int>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return CreatedAtAction(nameof(GetById), new { id = result.Data }, 
                ApiResponseDto<int>.Success(result.Data, "Purchase invoice created successfully"));
        }

        [HttpPost("{id:int}/cancel")]
        public async Task<ActionResult<ApiResponseDto<object?>>> Cancel(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
        {
            var result = await _purchaseService.CancelAsync(id, cancellationToken);
            if (result.IsFailure)
                return BadRequest(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Fail(result.Error ?? "Error"));

            return Ok(ApiResponseDto<object?>.Success(null, "Purchase invoice cancelled successfully"));
        }
    }
}

5. تسجيل الـ Dependency Injection (للمشتريات Backend)
في SalesSystem.Application/DependencyInjection.cs:
C#
services.AddScoped<IPurchaseService, PurchaseService>();
في SalesSystem.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs:
C#
services.AddScoped<IPurchaseInvoiceRepository, PurchaseInvoiceRepository>();

ماذا حققنا الآن؟
لقد أصبح الباك إند (Backend) الخاص بالمشتريات جاهزاً بالكامل للتعامل مع الفواتير، حساباتها المعقدة، زيادة المخزون، وربط مديونية الموردين.
الخطوة المنطقية القادمة هي بناء واجهات الـ Desktop الخاصة بالمشتريات (Purchase API Client, PurchasesListControl, PurchaseEditorForm). شاشة الإدخال هنا ستكون من نوع Master-Detail (رأس الفاتورة + جدول تفاصيل الأصناف).
هل أبدأ ببرمجة واجهة الديسكتوب للمشتريات الآن؟


أهلاً بك مجدداً يا بطل. بناءً على طلبك، سنستمر الآن في بناء واجهات سطح المكتب (Desktop UI) الخاصة بـ موديول المشتريات (Purchases Module).
شاشة المشتريات ستكون من نوع Master-Detail (رأس الفاتورة + تفاصيل الأصناف)، وهي من أهم الشاشات وأكثرها تفاعلاً.
إليك الكود الكامل لطبقة الـ Desktop الخاصة بالمشتريات، جاهز للنسخ والتطبيق:

1. خدمات الاتصال بالـ API (Desktop API Services)
ضع هذه الملفات في SalesSystem.Desktop/Services/Api.
IPurchaseApiService.cs
C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Purchases;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public interface IPurchaseApiService
    {
        Task<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task<PurchaseInvoiceDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
            
        Task CancelAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}
PurchaseApiService.cs
C#
using System.Net.Http.Json;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Purchases;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api
{
    public class PurchaseApiService : ApiServiceBase, IPurchaseApiService
    {
        public PurchaseApiService(HttpClient httpClient) : base(httpClient) { }

        public async Task<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>> GetPagedAsync(
            PagedQueryRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var url = $"api/purchases?pageNumber={request.PageNumber}&pageSize={request.PageSize}";
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(request.SearchTerm))
                url += $"&searchTerm={Uri.EscapeDataString(request.SearchTerm.Trim())}";

            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync(url, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<PagedResultDto<PurchaseInvoiceListDto>>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<PurchaseInvoiceDto?> GetByIdAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.GetAsync($"api/purchases/{id}", cancellationToken);
            return await ReadNullableAsync<PurchaseInvoiceDto>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task<int> CreateAsync(
            CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto request, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsJsonAsync("api/purchases", request, cancellationToken);
            return await ReadAsync<int>(response, cancellationToken);
        }

        public async Task CancelAsync(
            int id, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            var response = await HttpClient.PostAsync($"api/purchases/{id}/cancel", null, cancellationToken);
            await EnsureSuccessAsync(response, cancellationToken);
        }
    }
}

2. شاشة قائمة المشتريات (Purchases List Control)
ضع هذا الملف في SalesSystem.Desktop/Controls/Purchases.
PurchasesListControl.cs
C#
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Controls.Purchases
{
    public class PurchasesListControl : UserControl
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseApiService _purchaseApiService;
        private readonly IServiceProvider _serviceProvider;
        private readonly BindingSource _bindingSource = new();

        private TextBox txtSearch = null!;
        private Button btnSearch = null!;
        private Button btnRefresh = null!;
        private Button btnAdd = null!;
        private Button btnView = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvInvoices = null!;
        private Label lblStatus = null!;

        public PurchasesListControl(IPurchaseApiService purchaseApiService, IServiceProvider serviceProvider)
        {
            _purchaseApiService = purchaseApiService;
            _serviceProvider = serviceProvider;
            InitializeComponent();
            Load += async (_, _) => await LoadInvoicesAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Dock = DockStyle.Fill;
            var topPanel = new Panel { Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 50, Padding = new Padding(8) };

            txtSearch = new TextBox { Width = 260, PlaceholderText = "ابحث برقم الفاتورة أو المورد..." };
            btnSearch = new Button { Text = "بحث", Width = 80 };
            btnSearch.Click += async (_, _) => await LoadInvoicesAsync();

            btnRefresh = new Button { Text = "تحديث", Width = 80 };
            btnRefresh.Click += async (_, _) => { txtSearch.Clear(); await LoadInvoicesAsync(); };

            btnAdd = new Button { Text = "فاتورة جديدة", Width = 100 };
            btnAdd.Click += async (_, _) => await OpenEditorAsync();

            btnView = new Button { Text = "عرض التفاصيل", Width = 100 };
            btnView.Click += (_, _) =>
            {
                // في الخطوة القادمة سنضيف نافذة عرض الفاتورة (Read-Only)
                MessageBox.Show("سيتم إضافة شاشة عرض تفاصيل الفاتورة لاحقاً.");
            };

            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "إلغاء الفاتورة", Width = 100 };
            btnCancel.Click += async (_, _) => await CancelSelectedAsync();

            var buttonsPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 500, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.RightToLeft, WrapContents = false };
            buttonsPanel.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { btnCancel, btnView, btnAdd, btnRefresh, btnSearch });

            var searchPanel = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, WrapContents = false };
            searchPanel.Controls.Add(txtSearch);

            topPanel.Controls.Add(searchPanel);
            topPanel.Controls.Add(buttonsPanel);

            dgvInvoices = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, ReadOnly = true, AllowUserToAddRows = false, AllowUserToDeleteRows = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, MultiSelect = false, AutoGenerateColumns = true
            };
            dgvInvoices.DataSource = _bindingSource;

            lblStatus = new Label { Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 24, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft, Text = "جاهز" };

            Controls.Add(dgvInvoices);
            Controls.Add(lblStatus);
            Controls.Add(topPanel);
        }

        private async Task LoadInvoicesAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                SetBusy(true);
                var result = await _purchaseApiService.GetPagedAsync(new PagedQueryRequestDto { PageNumber = 1, PageSize = 200, SearchTerm = txtSearch.Text });
                _bindingSource.DataSource = result.Items.ToList();
                lblStatus.Text = $"عدد الفواتير: {result.TotalCount}";
                FormatGrid();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { SetBusy(false); }
        }

        private void FormatGrid()
        {
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Count == 0) return;

            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("PurchaseInvoiceId")) dgvInvoices.Columns["PurchaseInvoiceId"].Visible = false;
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("InvoiceNo")) dgvInvoices.Columns["InvoiceNo"].HeaderText = "رقم الفاتورة";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("SupplierName")) dgvInvoices.Columns["SupplierName"].HeaderText = "المورد";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("WarehouseName")) dgvInvoices.Columns["WarehouseName"].HeaderText = "المخزن";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("InvoiceDate")) dgvInvoices.Columns["InvoiceDate"].HeaderText = "التاريخ";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("PaymentType")) dgvInvoices.Columns["PaymentType"].HeaderText = "نوع الدفع";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("TotalAmount")) dgvInvoices.Columns["TotalAmount"].HeaderText = "الإجمالي";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("DueAmount")) dgvInvoices.Columns["DueAmount"].HeaderText = "المتبقي";
            if (dgvInvoices.Columns.Contains("Status")) dgvInvoices.Columns["Status"].HeaderText = "الحالة";
        }

        private int? GetSelectedInvoiceId()
        {
            if (dgvInvoices.CurrentRow?.DataBoundItem is not PurchaseInvoiceListDto row) return null;
            return row.PurchaseInvoiceId;
        }

        private async Task OpenEditorAsync()
        {
            // نستخدم الـ ServiceProvider لجلب الـ Form مع كامل تبعياته (API Clients الموردين، المنتجات، الخ)
            using var form = Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderServiceExtensions.GetRequiredService<PurchaseEditorForm>(_serviceProvider);
            var owner = FindForm();
            var result = owner is not null ? form.ShowDialog(owner) : form.ShowDialog();
            if (result == DialogResult.OK) await LoadInvoicesAsync();
        }

        private async Task CancelSelectedAsync()
        {
            var id = GetSelectedInvoiceId();
            if (id is null) { MessageBox.Show("اختر فاتورة أولاً."); return; }

            if (MessageBox.Show("إلغاء الفاتورة سيقوم بخصم المنتجات من المخزون وتخفيض رصيد المورد.\nهل أنت متأكد؟", "تأكيد الإلغاء", MessageBoxButtons.YesNo, MessageBoxIcon.Warning) != DialogResult.Yes) return;

            try
            {
                await _purchaseApiService.CancelAsync(id.Value);
                MessageBox.Show("تم إلغاء الفاتورة بنجاح.", "نجاح", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information);
                await LoadInvoicesAsync();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
        }

        private void SetBusy(bool busy)
        {
            Cursor = busy ? Cursors.WaitCursor : Cursors.Default;
            txtSearch.Enabled = btnSearch.Enabled = btnRefresh.Enabled = btnAdd.Enabled = btnView.Enabled = btnCancel.Enabled = !busy;
        }
    }
}

3. شاشة إدخال فاتورة الشراء (Purchase Editor Form)
هذه الشاشة معقدة قليلاً لأنها تجمع رأس الفاتورة وإدخال الأصناف. ضع هذا الملف في SalesSystem.Desktop/Forms/Purchases.
PurchaseEditorForm.cs
C#
using System.ComponentModel;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Common;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Invoices.Purchases;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Products;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Suppliers;
using SalesSystem.Contracts.Warehouses;
using SalesSystem.Desktop.Services.Api;

namespace SalesSystem.Desktop.Forms.Purchases
{
    public class PurchaseEditorForm : Form
    {
        private readonly IPurchaseApiService _purchaseApiService;
        private readonly ISupplierApiService _supplierApiService;
        private readonly IWarehouseApiService _warehouseApiService;
        private readonly IProductApiService _productApiService;
        
        private readonly BindingList<CreatePurchaseInvoiceItemRequestDto> _items = new();

        // Header Controls
        private ComboBox cmbSupplier = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbWarehouse = null!;
        private DateTimePicker dtpInvoiceDate = null!;
        private ComboBox cmbPaymentType = null!;
        
        // Item Entry Controls
        private ComboBox cmbProduct = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudQuantity = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudUnitCost = null!;
        private Button btnAddItem = null!;
        private DataGridView dgvItems = null!;

        // Footer Controls
        private NumericUpDown nudDiscount = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudTax = null!;
        private NumericUpDown nudPaid = null!;
        private TextBox txtNotes = null!;
        private Label lblSubTotal = null!;
        private Label lblTotal = null!;
        private Label lblDue = null!;
        
        private Button btnSave = null!;
        private Button btnCancel = null!;

        public PurchaseEditorForm(
            IPurchaseApiService purchaseApiService,
            ISupplierApiService supplierApiService,
            IWarehouseApiService warehouseApiService,
            IProductApiService productApiService)
        {
            _purchaseApiService = purchaseApiService;
            _supplierApiService = supplierApiService;
            _warehouseApiService = warehouseApiService;
            _productApiService = productApiService;
            
            InitializeComponent();
            Shown += async (_, _) => await LoadLookupsAsync();
        }

        private void InitializeComponent()
        {
            Text = "فاتورة مشتريات جديدة";
            Size = new Size(950, 700);
            StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent;
            RightToLeft = RightToLeft.Yes;
            RightToLeftLayout = true;
            MinimumSize = new Size(900, 650);

            // --- Header Section (بيانات الفاتورة) ---
            var grpHeader = new GroupBox { Text = "بيانات الفاتورة", Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 80, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            cmbSupplier = new ComboBox { Width = 200, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            cmbWarehouse = new ComboBox { Width = 150, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            dtpInvoiceDate = new DateTimePicker { Width = 150, Format = DateTimePickerFormat.Short };
            cmbPaymentType = new ComboBox { Width = 120, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            
            cmbPaymentType.Items.Add(new { Text = "نقدي (Cash)", Value = InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash });
            cmbPaymentType.Items.Add(new { Text = "آجل (Credit)", Value = InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit });
            cmbPaymentType.Items.Add(new { Text = "مختلط (Mixed)", Value = InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Mixed });
            cmbPaymentType.DisplayMember = "Text";
            cmbPaymentType.ValueMember = "Value";
            cmbPaymentType.SelectedIndex = 0;
            cmbPaymentType.SelectedIndexChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();

            var flpHeader = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight };
            flpHeader.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] {
                new Label { Text = "المورد:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, cmbSupplier,
                new Label { Text = "المخزن:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, cmbWarehouse,
                new Label { Text = "التاريخ:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, dtpInvoiceDate,
                new Label { Text = "الدفع:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, cmbPaymentType
            });
            grpHeader.Controls.Add(flpHeader);

            // --- Item Entry Section (إضافة صنف) ---
            var grpItemEntry = new GroupBox { Text = "إضافة صنف", Dock = DockStyle.Top, Height = 70, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            cmbProduct = new ComboBox { Width = 250, DropDownStyle = ComboBoxStyle.DropDownList };
            nudQuantity = new NumericUpDown { Width = 80, DecimalPlaces = 3, Minimum = 0.001m, Maximum = 100000m, Value = 1m };
            nudUnitCost = new NumericUpDown { Width = 100, DecimalPlaces = 2, Maximum = 1000000m };
            btnAddItem = new Button { Text = "إضافة للشبكة", Width = 100 };
            
            cmbProduct.SelectedIndexChanged += (_, _) =>
            {
                if (cmbProduct.SelectedItem is ProductLookupDto prod) nudUnitCost.Value = prod.PurchasePrice;
            };

            btnAddItem.Click += BtnAddItem_Click;

            var flpItemEntry = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Fill, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight };
            flpItemEntry.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] {
                new Label { Text = "الصنف:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, cmbProduct,
                new Label { Text = "الكمية:", Width = 50, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, nudQuantity,
                new Label { Text = "سعر الشراء:", Width = 80, TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleLeft }, nudUnitCost,
                btnAddItem
            });
            grpItemEntry.Controls.Add(flpItemEntry);

            // --- Grid Section (الشبكة) ---
            dgvItems = new DataGridView
            {
                Dock = DockStyle.Fill, AllowUserToAddRows = false, AutoGenerateColumns = false,
                SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect, MultiSelect = false
            };
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "ProductId", HeaderText = "رقم الصنف", ReadOnly = true, Width = 80 });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { HeaderText = "اسم الصنف", ReadOnly = true, Width = 200 }); // سيتم تعبئته برمجيا
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "Quantity", HeaderText = "الكمية", Width = 80 });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "UnitCost", HeaderText = "السعر", Width = 100 });
            dgvItems.Columns.Add(new DataGridViewTextBoxColumn { DataPropertyName = "DiscountAmount", HeaderText = "خصم الصنف", Width = 80 });
            dgvItems.DataSource = _items;
            
            _items.ListChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();
            dgvItems.CellValueChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();
            dgvItems.RowsRemoved += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();

            // --- Footer Section (الإجماليات والحفظ) ---
            var grpFooter = new GroupBox { Text = "الإجماليات والحفظ", Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, Height = 140 };
            nudDiscount = new NumericUpDown { Width = 100, DecimalPlaces = 2, Maximum = 1000000m };
            nudTax = new NumericUpDown { Width = 100, DecimalPlaces = 2, Maximum = 1000000m };
            nudPaid = new NumericUpDown { Width = 100, DecimalPlaces = 2, Maximum = 10000000m };
            txtNotes = new TextBox { Width = 300, Multiline = true, Height = 50, PlaceholderText = "ملاحظات الفاتورة..." };
            
            nudDiscount.ValueChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();
            nudTax.ValueChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();
            nudPaid.ValueChanged += (_, _) => CalculateTotals();

            lblSubTotal = new Label { Width = 150, Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 10, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.Blue };
            lblTotal = new Label { Width = 150, Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 11, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.Green };
            lblDue = new Label { Width = 150, Font = new Font("Segoe UI", 11, FontStyle.Bold), ForeColor = Color.Red };

            btnSave = new Button { Text = "حفظ الفاتورة", Width = 150, Height = 40, BackColor = Color.LightGreen };
            btnSave.Click += async (_, _) => await SaveInvoiceAsync();
            btnCancel = new Button { Text = "إغلاق", Width = 100, Height = 40 };
            btnCancel.Click += (_, _) => Close();

            var flpFooterLeft = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Right, Width = 400, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.TopDown, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            flpFooterLeft.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] {
                new Label { Text = "الخصم الإجمالي:" }, nudDiscount,
                new Label { Text = "الضريبة:" }, nudTax,
                new Label { Text = "المبلغ المدفوع:" }, nudPaid
            });

            var flpFooterRight = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Left, Width = 300, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.TopDown, Padding = new Padding(10) };
            flpFooterRight.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { lblSubTotal, lblTotal, lblDue, txtNotes });

            var flpButtons = new FlowLayoutPanel { Dock = DockStyle.Bottom, FlowDirection = FlowDirection.LeftToRight, Padding = new Padding(10), Height = 60 };
            flpButtons.Controls.AddRange(new Control[] { btnSave, btnCancel });

            grpFooter.Controls.Add(flpFooterLeft);
            grpFooter.Controls.Add(flpFooterRight);
            grpFooter.Controls.Add(flpButtons);

            Controls.Add(dgvItems);
            Controls.Add(grpItemEntry);
            Controls.Add(grpHeader);
            Controls.Add(grpFooter);
        }

        private async Task LoadLookupsAsync()
        {
            try
            {
                UseWaitCursor = true;
                
                var suppliersTask = _supplierApiService.GetLookupAsync();
                var warehousesTask = _warehouseApiService.GetLookupAsync();
                var productsTask = _productApiService.LookupAsync();

                await Task.WhenAll(suppliersTask, warehousesTask, productsTask);

                cmbSupplier.DataSource = suppliersTask.Result.ToList();
                cmbSupplier.DisplayMember = "Name";
                cmbSupplier.ValueMember = "SupplierId";

                cmbWarehouse.DataSource = warehousesTask.Result.ToList();
                cmbWarehouse.DisplayMember = "Name";
                cmbWarehouse.ValueMember = "WarehouseId";

                cmbProduct.DataSource = productsTask.Result.ToList();
                cmbProduct.DisplayMember = "Name";
                cmbProduct.ValueMember = "ProductId";
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { MessageBox.Show(ex.Message, "خطأ بالتحميل", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error); }
            finally { UseWaitCursor = false; }
        }

        private void BtnAddItem_Click(object? sender, EventArgs e)
        {
            if (cmbProduct.SelectedItem is not ProductLookupDto product) return;

            var existingItem = _items.FirstOrDefault(x => x.ProductId == product.ProductId);
            if (existingItem != null)
            {
                existingItem.Quantity += nudQuantity.Value;
                _items.ResetBindings();
            }
            else
            {
                _items.Add(new CreatePurchaseInvoiceItemRequestDto
                {
                    ProductId = product.ProductId,
                    Quantity = nudQuantity.Value,
                    UnitCost = nudUnitCost.Value,
                    DiscountAmount = 0
                });
            }

            // تحديث اسم الصنف في الشبكة (مؤقتاً لأن DTO لا يحتوي اسم الصنف للطلب)
            dgvItems.Rows[_items.Count - 1].Cells[1].Value = product.Name;
            
            nudQuantity.Value = 1;
        }

        private void CalculateTotals()
        {
            decimal subTotal = _items.Sum(i => (i.Quantity * i.UnitCost) - i.DiscountAmount);
            decimal total = subTotal - nudDiscount.Value + nudTax.Value;
            
            var paymentType = (InvoicePaymentTypeDto)cmbPaymentType.SelectedValue!;
            if (paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Cash) { nudPaid.Value = total; nudPaid.Enabled = false; }
            else if (paymentType == InvoicePaymentTypeDto.Credit) { nudPaid.Value = 0; nudPaid.Enabled = false; }
            else { nudPaid.Enabled = true; } // Mixed

            decimal due = total - nudPaid.Value;

            lblSubTotal.Text = $"المجموع الفرعي: {subTotal:N2}";
            lblTotal.Text = $"الإجمالي النهائي: {total:N2}";
            lblDue.Text = $"المتبقي (الدين): {due:N2}";
        }

        private async Task SaveInvoiceAsync()
        {
            if (_items.Count == 0) { MessageBox.Show("أضف صنفاً واحداً على الأقل."); return; }
            if (cmbSupplier.SelectedValue == null) { MessageBox.Show("اختر المورد."); return; }
            if (cmbWarehouse.SelectedValue == null) { MessageBox.Show("اختر المخزن."); return; }

            var request = new CreatePurchaseInvoiceRequestDto
            {
                SupplierId = (int)cmbSupplier.SelectedValue,
